headline: Why The PPL (PPL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Refresh Targets And Growth Views
summary: PPL’s updated analyst work now points to a blended fair value estimate of US$42.13 per share, up from US$41.33. This is putting fresh focus on where the stock might have room to move next. This shift lines up with a research backdrop where several firms have raised targets into the low to mid US$40s, while others have trimmed or nudged numbers only slightly as they reassess earnings and regulatory assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what to watch as...
